query: SELECT p.id as property_id, p.name as property_name, COUNT(r.id) as room_count FROM properties p LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.property_id = p.id WHERE p.name IN ('The Siam Riverside Hotel', 'Siam Business Suites') GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
